chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

text: 2380 - وَ سَأَلَهُ مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ : عَنْ دَجَاجِ اَلْحَبَشِ فَقَالَ «لَيْسَ مِنَ اَلصَّيْدِ إِنَّمَا اَلطَّيْرُ مَا طَارَ بَيْنَ اَلسَّمَاءِ وَ اَلْأَرْضِ وَ صَفَّ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2380 - Mu'awiya ibn Ammar asked him about Ethiopian chickens.
Imam (as) replied: "It is not considered part of the game (ṣayd); game birds are those that fly between the sky and the earth and flap their wings."
